Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Charles Swan.
Attorney, Mercedes Gavin, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Carrie Swan, is present.
Attorney, Kristin Messer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
Litigants and counsel confer privately ,for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JULY 08, 2013 remains on calendar.
